title: Plett Pioneers breeze into SWD quarterfinals
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Plett Pioneers cricket club made light work of their two Pool C matches in the Six Gun Grill SWD league competition on Saturday 5 October at New Horizons, winning both their fixtures against Blanco and Mayflower.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Plett Pioneers cricket club made light work of their two Pool C matches in the Six Gun Grill SWD league competition on Saturday 5 October at New Horizons, winning both their fixtures against Blanco and Mayflower."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They now head to the quarterfinals of the competition which takes place this coming weekend. Pioneers will be travelling to Oudtshoorn on Saturday to face Union Stars 1 CC at the Bridgton Sports Grounds.","html":"They now head to the quarterfinals of the competition which takes place this coming weekend. Pioneers will be travelling to Oudtshoorn on Saturday to face Union Stars 1 CC at the Bridgton Sports Grounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars are a highly respected team within the region, having won a number of leagues and competitions over many years.","html":"Union Stars are a highly respected team within the region, having won a number of leagues and competitions over many years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars finished third last year in the Premier League 50-over competition.","html":"Union Stars finished third last year in the Premier League 50-over competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams will be strengthened with the availability of Garden Route Badgers professional players, which should make for a great contest.","html":"Both teams will be strengthened with the availability of Garden Route Badgers professional players, which should make for a great contest."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Plett Pioneers will have Kyle Jacobs and Tyrese Karelse while Union Stars will have Thomas Kaber and Yaseen Valli."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pioneers have shown that they are definitely punching above their weight after winning all three of their pool games.","html":"Pioneers have shown that they are definitely punching above their weight after winning all three of their pool games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Excellent performance'","html":"'Excellent performance'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This was indeed an excellent performance all round. Winning 3 from 3 in our pool. The hard work that the guys have put in during the off-season was rewarded on the field,\" said manager and former Pioneers captain Carlos \"CK\" Koeberg, who is also a board member of and vice-president of SWD.","html":"\"This was indeed an excellent performance all round. Winning 3 from 3 in our pool. The hard work that the guys have put in during the off-season was rewarded on the field,\" said manager and former Pioneers captain Carlos \"CK\" Koeberg, who is also a board member of and vice-president of SWD."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It is however important that the team stays grounded, and works hard this week during practice. In the quarterfinals we will be up against formidable opponents in Union Stars.","html":"\"It is however important that the team stays grounded, and works hard this week during practice. In the quarterfinals we will be up against formidable opponents in Union Stars."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"As a small town, we are punching above our weight - but these small-town players have big hearts and will not stop working."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Our families and community supporters are our rocks. They're the 12th man in our team!\" said Koeberg.","html":"\"Our families and community supporters are our rocks. They're the 12th man in our team!\" said Koeberg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Standout performers on Saturday were:","html":"Standout performers on Saturday were:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elijh Thorne - Top run-scorer and wicket-taker;","html":"Elijh Thorne - Top run-scorer and wicket-taker;"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wayne Oraai - All-rounder who had a 5-wicket haul;","html":"Wayne Oraai - All-rounder who had a 5-wicket haul;"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lee-Mar Pedro and Eden Tarentaal - excellent opening partnerships in two matches;","html":"Lee-Mar Pedro and Eden Tarentaal - excellent opening partnerships in two matches;"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mbuyiseli Malanga - Most economical bowler.","html":"Mbuyiseli Malanga - Most economical bowler."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Game 1: Plett Pioneers vs Blanco","html":"Game 1: Plett Pioneers vs Blanco"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pioneers won the toss, elected to bowl first. Dismissed Blanco for 73. Pioneers 74/0. Pioneers won by 10 wickets.","html":"Pioneers won the toss, elected to bowl first. Dismissed Blanco for 73. Pioneers 74/0. Pioneers won by 10 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Game 2: Mayflower vs Blanco","html":"Game 2: Mayflower vs Blanco"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mayflower won by 4 wickets.","html":"Mayflower won by 4 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Game 3: Plett Pioneers vs Mayflower","html":"Game 3: Plett Pioneers vs Mayflower"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers won the toss and elected to bat first. Pioneers posted 173 in 20 overs with standout batter Elijh Thorne scoring 52 not out.","html":"Plett Pioneers won the toss and elected to bat first. Pioneers posted 173 in 20 overs with standout batter Elijh Thorne scoring 52 not out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mayflower finished on 122 in 20 overs, meaning Pioneers won by 51 runs.","html":"Mayflower finished on 122 in 20 overs, meaning Pioneers won by 51 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Plett Pioneers breeze into SWD quarterfinals
